title: Project Details

fields.label: Short Brief
fields.name: project_short_brief
fields.instructions: A 1–2 sentence summary of the project. Displayed below the project title in the hero section at the top of the case study page.
fields.placeholder: e.g. We redesigned Acme Corp's e-commerce platform from the ground up, cutting checkout drop-off by 40% in the first month.

fields.label: Tech Stack
fields.name: project_tech_stack
fields.instructions: Comma-separated list of technologies used. Displayed as small bordered tags below the Short Brief in the hero section. e.g. WordPress, WooCommerce, PHP, Tailwind CSS
fields.placeholder: e.g. WordPress, WooCommerce, PHP, Tailwind CSS

fields.label: The Challenge
fields.name: project_challenge
fields.instructions: Describe the problem or challenge this project solved. Displayed in the 'Challenge & Approach' section below the hero.
fields.placeholder: What was the client struggling with before working with us?

fields.label: Our Approach
fields.name: project_solution
fields.instructions: Describe the solution or approach taken. Displayed alongside The Challenge in the detail section.

fields.label: Results & Metrics
fields.name: project_results
fields.instructions:
One card per line. Format: VALUE : Title : Description

Example:
24 : Unique Screens Designed : Covering onboarding, card setup, payments, and smart investment flows.
65 : Custom UI Components : Built to increase speed, clarity, and confidence.
100% : Mobile-First Experience : Designed for users who handle money from their pocket.
fields.placeholder:
24 : Unique Screens Designed : Covering onboarding, card setup, payments, and smart investment flows.
65 : Custom UI Components : Built to increase speed, clarity, and confidence.

fields.label: Project Images
fields.name: project_images
fields.instructions: Upload up to 4 project screenshots or mockups. Image 1 is displayed as the full-width hero image in the gallery section. Images 2–4 appear in a grid below it.

sub_fields.label: Image 1 — Hero (full width)
sub_fields.name: project_image_1
sub_fields.instructions: Main project image — displayed full-width at the top of the gallery section.

sub_fields.label: Image 2 — Grid
sub_fields.name: project_image_2
sub_fields.instructions: Second image — appears in the left column of the grid below the hero image.

sub_fields.label: Image 3 — Grid
sub_fields.name: project_image_3
sub_fields.instructions: Third image — appears in the right column of the grid.

sub_fields.label: Image 4 — Grid
sub_fields.name: project_image_4
sub_fields.instructions: Fourth image — appears in a full-width row below images 2 and 3.

description: Meta fields for case study / project posts.
